description_long: This is a floor-standing bookcase constructed entirely from a gray, marble-like material, giving it a solid and luxurious appearance. The bookcase features three horizontal shelves, each with a slightly protruding lip, and is filled with a variety of rectangular objects resembling books, some stacked and some upright. The back panel is a single, unbroken slab of the same marble material, providing structural support and a clean, monolithic look. The sides are straight and flush with the shelves, emphasizing a minimalist, modern design. The marble surface has a subtle, natural veining pattern, adding visual interest and texture. No visible hardware, signage, or decorative elements are present, reinforcing the sleek, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, marble-textured bookcase with three shelves, filled with books and featuring a minimalist, monolithic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three marble shelves filled with books, with visible veining and a clean, minimalist structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the bookcase and the protruding shelves, with no visible books from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid marble back panel with natural veining, no shelves or books visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and shelf overhangs.
